title: hieracium rapunculoides subsp. neoperrieranum
intro: Hieracium rapunculoides subsp. neoperrieranum, a lesser-known subspecies of the Hieracium rapunculoides plant, is a type of flowering plant in the dandelion family (Asteraceae). This plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Hieracium rapunculoides subsp. neoperrieranum include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used as a tea, tincture, or infusement, although more research is needed to confirm its safety and efficacy.
